message:
fix(compile): Make all import/module compilation errors fail fast

Changed all import/module compilation warnings to hard errors:
- compile.zig: Pre-compile module errors now return instead of continue
- compile.zig: Local module compilation errors now return instead of warn
- compile.zig: Imported module errors now return instead of continue
- imports.zig: Submodule compilation errors now return instead of continue

All error messages changed from "Warning:" to "ERROR:" with clear context.
This ensures CI catches import failures immediately instead of silently
continuing and reporting false success.

Fixes the "fail fast fail loud" requirement for import errors.
